emails.body: Morgan Stanley Prime Broker Agreement and Overseas Lending Agreement Sara, May I have a copy of the Morgan Stanley Prime Broker Agreement and the Overseas Lending Agreement. Jeff and I have been talking to Goldman Sachs about a similar arrangement and wanted to re-review the Morgan Stanley structure. Thank. Sheila

emails.body: Re: Morgan Stanley Prime Broker Agreement and Overseas Lending Agreement Sheila: Please per my voice mail, let's sit down in my office and catch up because there are a lot of loose ends on the brokerage side (particularly with Marie leaving). I can address you emails (current and past) at that time. Thanks. Sara From: Sheila Glover 04/12/2000 02:39 PM
